products.name: Gold Dust Truffle Box
products.description: Luxurious handcrafted dark chocolate truffles dusted with 24k edible gold. A premium gift box of 16 pieces.

products.name: Cocoa Noir Dark Bar
products.description: Intense 85% single-origin dark chocolate bar. Rich, bold flavor with notes of espresso and dried fruit.

products.name: Artisan Praline Collection
products.description: Hand-decorated pralines topped with hazelnuts, sea salt, caramel drizzle, and raspberry. Assorted flavors.

products.name: Jewel Bonbon Selection
products.description: Stunning glossy bonbons in vibrant jewel-tone shells. Each filled with unique ganache flavors.

products.name: Hazelnut Milk Chocolate Bar
products.description: Creamy milk chocolate loaded with whole roasted hazelnuts. Smooth, nutty, and irresistible.

products.name: Premium Cocoa Powder
products.description: Single-origin Dutch-process cocoa powder in a handcrafted jar. Perfect for hot chocolate and baking.
